title: W(3,3)-E8 Correspondence Theorem: Standard Model from Finite Geometry
description: A computational derivation of the Standard Model from the W(3,3) generalized quadrangle and the E8 Lie algebra correspondence. The project contains 207+ proved pillars (executable verification scripts) and 5500+ automated tests, plus a 225/225 master-check spine (THEORY_OF_EVERYTHING.py). Key derived constants include sin^2(theta_W)=3/13 at electroweak scale (running from 3/8 at SU(5) GUT) and alpha_GUT^{-1}=8pi, with three generations protected by H1=Z^81 and an operator-exact Hodge firewall/matter sector.
notes: 207+ proved pillars, 5500+ automated tests, and 225/225 master checks. Highlights: 240 edges ↔ 240 E8 roots; Aut(W33)=Sp(4,3)≅W(E6) of order 51840; H1(W33;Z)=Z^81 = 27×3 generations (E6 fundamental × generations) protected by the Hodge projector; Moonshine bridge constants expressed in W(3,3) parameters; metaplectic/Weil phase law threads the CE2 corrections through the L∞ firewall.
